title: IIT Hyderabad – Research Associate – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 1 Research Associate post for eligible Ph.D. candidates in Chemical Engineering with post-doctoral experience, with the email application process open until 30-05-2026 on iith.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering, Minimum 1 year post-doctoral experience, Extensive experience in Computational Studies on Molecular Dynamics in Polymer Domain

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
